title: Changelog launched
detail: SkillPack now tracks major leaderboard shifts, new entries, and re-rankings in real time.

title: Gemini CLI moves to #2 in coding-clis
detail: Weekly v0.35.0 releases plus doc-verified 1M context / 1K free requests pushed Gemini ahead of Codex CLI in the coding-clis ranking.

title: Copilot CLI jumps to #3 in coding-clis
detail: The v1.0.11 release, Reddit GA thread, and demo tweet proved Copilot CLI's adoption signal, so it now sits ahead of Codex CLI despite the ongoing PromptArmor security warning.

title: Aider promoted to #4 in coding-clis (was #10)
detail: 5.7M total installs, 200-250K/month, 15B tokens/week, and battle-tested reliability earn Aider a Tier 2 placement. Category pioneer with the strongest open-source terminal coding track record.

title: Copilot CLI demoted to #5 in coding-clis (was #4)
detail: 200-250K actual CLI installs from a 15M subscriber base is a 1.5% conversion rate — developers aren't switching. Malware incident and request limits dampen enthusiasm.

title: OpenHands drops to #7 in coding-clis (was #5)
detail: No evidence of widespread individual developer adoption despite 69.7K stars and strong benchmarking (OpenHands Index). Low HN traction and cloud-first latency weigh it down.

title: Cline drops to #8 in coding-clis (was #6)
detail: The Feb 2026 'Clinejection' supply chain attack (~4K machines affected) is the most severe trust incident in the coding agent category, pushing Cline below Goose and OpenHands.

title: Devin 2.2 enters coding-clis at #9
detail: SaaS autonomous agent with 67% PR merge rate (up from 34% YoY), GUI computer use, and Devin Review self-QA. Different workflow (web dashboard + Slack) but addresses the same problem space.

title: Grok Build added to coding-clis (below cut line)
detail: xAI's waitlist-only coding agent with unique 8-parallel-agent architecture and Arena Mode. Too early to rank — no public access after 10+ weeks — but design is worth tracking.
